Attributes.HelpText: Enable or Disable Smmu.Forced disable when 3408/3416 IMR card is present
Enable or disable Consistent Network Device Naming Support.
Enabled: The SMMU takes effect even if the 3408/3416 IMR card is available.

Select high-precision clock frequency . If  customer has requirements on the counting precision (for example,high-performance network forwarding suite in virtualization scenarios), 1GHz can be used.Note: If this parameter is setting to 1GHz, the configurable duration of the SBSA watchdog cannot exceed 4s.
Enable:Print the log to SerialPort;Disable:only critical log will be printed.

Select SMMU L1 TLB Granularity. If SMMU pagesize is no less than 64K, the granularity should be set to 2M.
Flexible IO can be closed by this option. if the flexible io is closed, user can't see this card in OS.
Flexible IO Port Num Control. The port can be closed only in sequence. For example, set the value to 1. Retain port 1 and disable port 2/3/4
Flexible IO Port Num Control. The port can be closed only in sequence. For example, set the value to 1. Retain port 1 and disable port 2/3/4.

Rx multiple tunnel function can greatly improves the rx packet processing capability of hardware.When enable rx multiple tunnel, the port with max speed 100Gbsp/200Gbps can not using hardware GRO;when disable rx multiple tunnel, the max packet rate will be reduced.
Set Port1 function number(include 1 PF and other VFs). The number of VFs in each Die cannot exceed 248. And the function number of port1 cannot exceed the Tqp number.
Set Port2 function number(include 1 PF and other VFs). The number of VFs in each Die cannot exceed 248. And the function number of port2 cannot exceed the Tqp number.

Enabled/Disabled the FLEX IO1 extend SGE function. Enable: the supported range of send sge is [1, 64], but the max QP number is limited to be less than 512K. Disable: only supports a maximum of 2 send sge, but can use up to 1M QP.

Enabled/Disabled the FLEX IO2 extend SGE function. Enable: the supported range of send sge is [1, 64], but the max QP number is limited to be less than 512K. Disable: only supports a maximum of 2 send sge, but can use up to 1M QP.

Memory Print Level Set. Disable: Do not print any memory init info. Minimum: Print the most important(High level) info. Minmax: Print the Mid-important(Mid level) and most important info. Maximum: Print all of the memory init info. You are advised not to modify this configuration.Otherwise, the system will display information for a long time and the startup will be affected.
Maximum Memory Frequency Selections in MHz. Auto:Max Freq System Support 3200~5200
Memory Custom Refresh Enabled

If enabled, server will not boot when memory error occurred during initialization

Assuming the width of the slot is X8,when you choose X2,the slot will be divided to 4 ports whose width is X2. When X2 is hidden in Setup, it means that this slot is not support to be divided into X2. For these slots, when set X2 through redfish, it will be modified to Disabled.

Set the maximum allowed time for BIOS system startup completion. If it exceeds the time, the watchdog will be triggered.The valid time range is 2-25 minutes.
Timeout Action Choices: No Action, Hard Reset, Power Down or Power Cycle

Enter the number of minutes the system firmware has to OS Load before it takes the Timeout Action. Valid values are from 5 to 8 minutes.
Timeout Action Choices: No Action, Hard Reset, Power Down or Power Cycle
Set the early warning time for certificate expiration. The value can be set from 7 to 180 days, and the default is 90 days.
Enable or disable Secure Boot. If Secure Boot is enabled, the BIOS will verify OS.
Clear Trusted Module. Removes all Trusted Module context associated with a specific Owner.
Select one of the supported operation to change Trusted Module state.
When Hidden, the Trusted Module device can not be exposed to the OS and can not update the state of Trusted Module device in Setup.
Password Expiration Policy Setting.Forcibly change the current password after 180 days.
Support TEE.
TEE Memory Size, values below max volume of secure memory or AUTO can be selected. When AUTO is selected, the TEE uses as much secure memory as possible.
Enable or disable memory encryption. If memory encryption is enabled, secure memory regions will be encrypted for data-protection.
Indicates whether the online core isolation function can be configured.
Specifies the number of CPUs on the server, which is used to control other variables related to the number of CPUs.
